---
title: "Books and Edited Volumes"
description: ""
title-block: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
header-includes: |
  <style>
    h1.title {
      display: none;
    }
  </style>
listing:

  - id: books
    include:
      type: "book"
    contents: books.yaml
    template: books.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    categories: false

  - id: volumes
    include:
      type: "volume"
    contents: books.yaml
    template: books.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    categories: false

toc: true
---

## Single-authored and Coauthored Books

(Click book covers for more information)

::: {#books}
:::

## Edited Volumes

::: {#volumes}
:::
